(()=>{ const editor = document.querySelector('.monaco-editor textarea') || document.querySelector('textarea') || document.querySelector('[role="textbox"]'); if(editor) { editor.value = `-- Create tables
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tables (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name text NOT NULL,
  type text NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('round', 'long')),
  capacity int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  position_x int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  position_y int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  relation_type text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS guests (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name text NOT NULL,
  side text NOT NULL CHECK (side IN ('bride', 'groom', 'both')),
  relation text NOT NULL,
  table_id uuid REFERENCES tables(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  seat_number int,
  special_needs text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conflicts (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  guest_a_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES guests(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  guest_b_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES guests(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  reason text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  UNIQUE(guest_a_id, guest_b_id)
);

-- Enable RLS
BEGIN;
  ALTER TABLE tables ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
  ALTER TABLE guests ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
  ALTER TABLE conflicts ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
  
  CREATE POLICY

ON tables FOR ALL USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);
  CREATE POLICY

ON guests FOR ALL USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);
  CREATE POLICY
